{{CargoRelic
|name=Autumn Scenery
|class_id=21140
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Zhao Boju’s mineral-pigmented masterpiece. Song Dynasty’s crowning landscape, fusing Tang grandeur with scholarly grace.
|fame=62
|art=106
|fth=64
|civ=69
|tech=61
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +30<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +40<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail ATK +4<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +50<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail ATK +5<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +70<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail ATK +7<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +90<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail ATK +9<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +120<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail ATK +12<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail HP +120<br>Per 3 Floating Isle species defeated, Snail ATK +12<br>Floating Isle species defeated: 180/180<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's ART +15
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail RUSH +600
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Orange Card Drops +6%
}}
